entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Community Day — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: Nickit Community Day Community Day Starts: Sunday, August 16, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time Ends: Sunday, August 16, 2026, at 5:00 PM Local Time

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Incense — Sunday — Shiny
entries.source_text: Shiny Nickit will be available! Trainers will have an increased chance of encountering Shiny Nickit during Community Day.

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Lure Encounters — Normal
entries.source_text: Nickit may be attracted to Lure Modules during the event.

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Lure Encounters — Shiny
entries.source_text: Nickit may be attracted to Lure Modules during the event.

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Lure Encounters — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: From 2:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time , Nickit will have a very high chance of appearing at PokeStops with active regular Lure Modules.

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Lure Encounters — Sunday — Shiny
entries.source_text: Nickit attracted to regular Lure Modules will still have an increased chance to be Shiny and may have a Special Background. That's more chances to encounter the featured Pokemon even after the event hours!

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Raids — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: Take a few snapshots during Community Day for a surprise! During the event you can snap an AR Photo and get photobombed by Nickit.

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Field Research — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: August Community Day—themed Field Research will be available! Catch Nickit to earn rewards such as Stardust, Ultra Balls, additional encounters with Nickit, and more! You may even find Field Research that leads to encounters with Nickit that have a Special Background—if you're lucky!

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Field Research — Sunday — Shiny
entries.source_text: August Community Day—themed Field Research will be available! Catch Nickit to earn rewards such as Stardust, Ultra Balls, additional encounters with Nickit, and more! You may even find Field Research that leads to encounters with Nickit that have a Special Background—if you're lucky!

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Special Research — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: 3 encounters with Nickit that have a Special Background (at the end of each page)

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Wild Encounters — Normal
entries.source_text: Nickit will appear more frequently in the wild.

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Wild Encounters — Shiny
entries.source_text: Nickit will appear more frequently in the wild.

entries.name: Nickit
entries.label: Wild Encounters — Sunday — Normal
entries.source_text: Nickit will appear more frequently in the wild.
